violations.description: Global CSS rule '* { outline: none; }' removes the focus indicator from all interactive elements. Keyboard users cannot see which element currently has focus, making navigation impossible.
violations.reference_fix: Remove 'outline: none' from the universal selector, or provide a custom focus style: *:focus { outline: 2px solid #3498db; outline-offset: 2px; }

page_description: A developer portfolio page with navigation, projects, and skills sections. The CSS contains '* { outline: none; }' which removes focus indicators from all elements.
